sourceRange.description: sourceRange returns UntrackedAttr when parent is null (parent==null branch)
sourceRange.precondition: Attribute constructed with key "k" and null parent

sourceRange.description: sourceRange returns parent's sourceRange when parent is non-null (parent!=null branch)
sourceRange.precondition: Attribute constructed with custom Attributes stub that overrides sourceRange(key) to return a known range
sourceRange.expectedResult: return value is the stubbed Range.AttributeRange instance
pseudocode: Attributes stubParent = new Attributes(){ @Override public Range.AttributeRange sourceRange(String k){ return expected; } };
